pi_items.source: setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts explicitly create and query for user_name "monitor_user".
setup_task.sh and export_result.sh explicitly create and check a study with unique_identifier "CV-REG-2023".
verifier.py strictly expects the assigned role_name to exactly equal "monitor".

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data where the target user account is "monitor_user" and the target study is "CV-REG-2023". To pass verification, the agent must assign the "monitor" role to this user for the specified study, with the action logged during the task execution timeframe.
